title: revue release manifest
description: Schema for the version manifest served at revue.sh/skills/manifest.json. The install script fetches this manifest to verify the current release version before copying the bundled skill.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Increment when the structure changes incompatibly.

current_version.description: Semver of the current revue wheel.

released_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the release.

minimum_supported_version.description: Wheels older than this should self-upgrade. Optional.

revue_core_min_version.description: Minimum revue_core version this skill wheel was built against (REVUE-310). When set, the install path can warn or refuse to load if a coexisting revue_core install is older. Optional and backwards-compatible; consumers SHOULD ignore unknown semver suffixes.

release_notes_url.description: Human-readable changelog for this release. Optional.

size_bytes.description: Size of the artefact in bytes. Optional.
